phase_1_targeted.description: Extended deep dives on 5 high-uncertainty families with 5-8 targeted web searches each

phase_2_supplementary.description: Wide-scope supplementary research on all 37 families with 6 web searches each (market, EPDs, recycling, standards, cross-regulatory, industry)

research_log.finding: No new implementing decisions for CEM. 2026/284 affects SHA/FIX only.
prEN 197-1 at stage 10.99, approved Jul 2025.
SReq C(2025) 4828 adopted Jul 2025. Expires Jun 2030.
EAD 150080 is sole CEM EAD. Ecocem facility targeting late 2026.
key_risks and sources_summary empty. TC field may need CEN/TC 459.
